title: Sullen: Light is Your Friend
description:
Five years ago in this forest..



A journalist wanted to go there.And (of course) he didnt come back. 



Few days later,he called his best friend.He just said to him "Come Here" and line dropped. 



You're the "Best friend" of this journalist.You listened your friend and you went there. 



AND NOW LET THE GAMES BEGIN!
description_short: FIVE YEARS AGO IN THIS FOREST.. A journalist wanted to go there.And of course he didnt come back. Few days later,he called his best friend.He just said to him "Come Here" and line dropped. You're the best friend of this guy.You listened your friend and you went there. LET THE GAME BEGIN
